description: Style NoteStay cool this summer in these flip flops from the Spanish sportswear and fashion brand kelme. The suave design adds an interesting dimension to the classic flip-flop without going over the top.Product DetailsBlunt toed flip flop in chocolate brown with synthetic thong style strapsLogo on the footbedSoft rubber footbedSingle piece rubber outsole that has textured groovesMaterial and CareSynthetic, rubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
